---
title: "Exercises + Solutions"
editor: source
---

# Exercises

## `06-tables-gtsummary.R`

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| class-output: "sourceCode r"

"tables-gtsummary.R" |> 
  readLines() |> 
  cat(sep = "\n")
```


# Solutions

## `06-tables-gtsummary.R`

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| class-output: "sourceCode r"

"answers/tables-gtsummary-answer.R" |> 
  readLines() |> 
  cat(sep = "\n")
```
